text: 11. Subcontractors may use Controlled Access Zones (CAZ) around the building perimeter for loading upper levels with tools, material, or equipment. The CAZ must first be flagged off or barricaded 100% of the perimeter, personal fall protection must be provided for all employees inside of the CAZ and at that time the perimeter fall protection can be removed to allow for loads to come onto the floor. The removal of perimeter fall protection within a CAZ must not compromise the remaining perimeter protection outside the CAZ. This operation must be approved by the project superintendent or his/her representative before starting work.
